travel_bookings.reason: 15 EDGE Miles per ₹200 on travel portal + 0% forex markup

dining.reason: 2X rewards on weekend dining = 6.66 RP per ₹150

groceries.reason: 5 MR per ₹100 on groceries + departmental stores

fuel.reason: 7X rewards on weekends, 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all

online_shopping.reason: 10X rewards via SmartBuy portal = 33 RP per ₹150

utilities.reason: 2 MR per ₹100 on all including utilities

insurance_premiums.reason: Full rewards on insurance (many cards exclude this)

card_ranking_overall.ideal_for: High spenders who travel internationally and want airline miles
International travelers, frequent flyers, those wanting simple earn rates
Those who can't get Infinia but want HDFC transfer ecosystem
Ultra-high spenders who value high base earn rate
Those who shop on Amex-friendly platforms and travel frequently

new_to_premium_path.step_1: Start with HDFC Regalia Gold or Axis Flipkart (₹500 fee, build history)
new_to_premium_path.step_2: After 6-12 months, upgrade to HDFC Regalia or Axis Atlas (₹1500-5000 fee)
new_to_premium_path.step_3: After 2+ years with good spend, apply for HDFC Infinia or Axis Magnus
new_to_premium_path.tip: HDFC values relationship (FD, savings account) over income alone. Open a FD-backed card if needed.
